title: Remove TickflowLease residue from the tick model
description:
Context: internal/tick/tick.go carries a TickflowLease field used only by the deleted Tickflow runner for stale-work leases (the old internal/recovery consumed it; that package is already deleted). Tick.Release() still clears it. The pi tickflow harness is being deleted in a sibling tick; the lease field is dead model surface.

Deliverable: remove TickflowLease from the tick model.
1. Remove the field from the Tick struct (internal/tick/tick.go) and the clearing in Release(); remove/update any tests referencing it (internal/tick/tick_test.go).
2. Grep 'TickflowLease|tickflow_lease' repo-wide first: if ANY consumer outside internal/tick + its tests exists (board UI types, query, schemas, generated types), STOP and report instead of deleting.
3. Backward compat: Go json.Unmarshal ignores unknown fields, so old tick JSON files carrying tickflow_lease still load; saving simply drops the field. State this was verified (add/keep a test that a tick JSON with an unknown tickflow_lease field round-trips without error).

Run: go test ./internal/tick/... and full go test ./...

Files likely touched: internal/tick/tick.go, internal/tick/tick_test.go.
acceptance_criteria: TickflowLease gone from model and tests; repo-wide grep clean; unknown-field round-trip test passes; go test ./... green
closed_reason: Completed: TickflowLease type, field, validation, Release() clearing and expiry helper removed; unknown-field round-trip test proves old tick JSONs still load; full suite green
